name: label
description: Accessible caption for a form control

meta.name: Label
meta.description: Accessible caption for a form control

props.name: htmlFor
props.description: Id of the form control this label is associated with.

props.name: asChild
props.description: When true, renders the child element as the root via Slot, merging props (polymorphic rendering).

props.name: required
props.description: When true, marks the field as required.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, disables the control and removes it from the tab order.

props.name: labels
props.description: Overrides for the component’s user-visible strings (i18n).

examples.title: asChild
examples.description: Render the label semantics onto a custom element via Slot.

whenToUse: Naming a single form control (input, select, checkbox) so clicking the text focuses it
Marking a field as required with a visible and screen-reader-announced indicator
whenNotToUse: Labeling a group of controls — use a <fieldset>/<legend> instead
Static body copy that is not associated with a control — use a plain text element

antiPatterns.why: Without htmlFor the label is not programmatically associated, so click-to-focus and screen-reader naming break
The required marker is rendered for you with an accessible text alternative; a hand-added asterisk is silent to screen readers

related.name: Field
related.reason: Field composes Label with a control, description, and error and wires the ids automatically

related.name: Input
related.reason: A label names the input it points at via htmlFor

intent.a11yRationale: Renders a native <label> so the platform handles click-to-focus and accessible naming; the required marker pairs an aria-hidden asterisk with visually-hidden localized text so the requirement is both seen and announced

content.tone: Short noun phrase naming the field
content.notes: Sentence case, no trailing colon; let the required marker convey requirement

flexibility.note: Colors and type must resolve to --cascivo-* semantic tokens
